storageDurabilityResult: durable — Local filesystem adapter (development or company-hosted disk). Production serverless requires P185_DURABLE_DATA_DIR or /mnt volume; /tmp and in-memory fail closed for live.
authenticationResult: Scheduler secret configured via CRON_SECRET or P185_CRON_SECRET (header Bearer / x-cron-secret). Query-string secrets rejected. Current local env may be unset — endpoint returns 503/401 until configured.
leaseConcurrencySimulation: PASS — overlapping acquire blocked; expired lease takeover succeeds; two-instance test: held lease skips second runner; release then second runs.

candidateSourceMapping.fallback: Skip candidate — missing id is not eligibility proof
Treat as unknown stage; P184 gates decide eligibility
Empty email fails P184 valid_email gate — never assume eligible

candidateSourceMapping.source: archived / withdrawn flags on ingestion or workflow
candidateSourceMapping.target: row notes + stage signals consumed by P184 not_archived
candidateSourceMapping.fallback: Missing archive flag ≠ active; P184 requires positive clear signals
Missing job → P184 job_active/position_accepting fail closed
Unpublished/missing job is not treated as open
null onboarding → P184 evaluates as not yet sent

candidateSourceMapping.target: Dropbox envelope + paperwork history for P184 gates
candidateSourceMapping.fallback: Missing envelope ≠ safe to send; duplicate gates still apply
Full reconciliation when cursor stale or cadence due

dryRunCycleResults.dryRunCycle: PASS — evaluates via P184, persists lastDryRunSuccessAt
dryRunCycleResults.liveGatedCycle: PASS — live only when all gates pass; mocked Dropbox send recorded sent_unverified then confirmed
dryRunCycleResults.missingEmail: PASS — zero sends when email missing

restartRecoveryResults: PASS — stale send_requested with envelope recovered to sent_unverified then confirmed_sent; P184 queue/rate-limit timestamps reload from disk after memory reset.
reconciliationResults: PASS — verification transitions sent_unverified → confirmed_sent; second pass does not re-verify confirmed; never resends on verify failure.
circuitBreakerResults: PASS — operator open blocks cycles; kill switch and pause-until skip sends; failure threshold opens circuit.
duplicateSendSimulation: PASS — P184 idempotency keys + completedIdempotencyKeys + P185 envelope/operation records; reconciliation never calls send.
timeoutBudgetSimulation: PASS — deadline in the past skips before candidate load / P184 claim.
productionBlockers: CRON_SECRET / P185_CRON_SECRET must be set in deployment
P185_PRODUCTION_AUTOMATION_ENABLED must be explicitly set to 1 for scheduled live
P184 config must be enabled with mode=live (not set by this change)
Durable storage required for live (P185_DURABLE_DATA_DIR or non-/tmp volume on serverless)
Successful recent dry-run validation required before live
Live sending left disabled by default
warnings: System left in scheduled dry-run / disabled mode — do not enable live without operator checklist.
Vercel Cron configured at */10 * * * * — runs authenticated endpoint only.
